task.title: 11 How to clean up the list with PRISMA sync updates in the settings editor of the engine

abstract.p: In the settings editor under Support-> Software updates -> Available PRISMAsync and operating system updates from On Remote Service a list of offered updates is present.
These items that are offered here can be removed, by revoking them. This is done in the ORS system.
Only the offered entries in this list are removed. No software is uninstalled.

section.title: Revoking software is done in ORS
section.p: First find the applicable engine via its serial number and open the selected engine.
The revoke button can be found via Remote data -> Software -> Revoke.

note.p: You need fleet manager privileges in ORS to be able to do this.
